## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, paste relevant logs or screenshots here.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.3]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.12.0]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
